text_body.plain_text: Executive Summary / Supplier TAM and SAM

runs.text: Supplier TAM and SAM | Combined supplier opportunity is ~$3.9B per year, with ~$3.3B addressable as broad component SAM.

text_body.plain_text: Supplier TAM and SAM | Combined supplier opportunity is ~$3.9B per year, with ~$3.3B addressable as broad component SAM.

runs.text: FY2022–FY2027 model-period averages, annualized; nominal then-year dollars.

text_body.plain_text: FY2022–FY2027 model-period averages, annualized; nominal then-year dollars.

COMBINED SUPPLIER TAM
$3.88B per year
$23.28B FY2022–FY2027 cumulative

COMBINED BROAD COMPONENT SAM
$3.28B per year
$19.70B FY2022–FY2027 cumulative

SUBMARINE TAM
$3.31B per year
~85% of combined TAM

DDG TAM
$573M per year
Smaller pool, distributed-production proof point

MODULAR ASSEMBLIES
$381M per year
Entity-flagged module-assembly work

runs.text: Seven-bucket envelope, not incremental to modular

text_body.plain_text:
BROAD INCLUDES MODULAR
Seven-bucket envelope, not incremental to modular

runs.text: Combined supplier TAM stacked by program vs broad component SAM, $B per year; FY2022–FY2027 average, nominal then-year.

text_body.plain_text: Combined supplier TAM stacked by program vs broad component SAM, $B per year; FY2022–FY2027 average, nominal then-year.

runs.text: The pool is submarine-led, while DDG supplies the distributed-production proof point.
Virginia/Columbia contributes $3.31B of the $3.88B annual TAM; DDG adds $573M per year and carries the clearest public distributed-production signal.
Broad SAM is the serviceable envelope, not a capture forecast.
Broad component manufacturing is $3.28B per year across the seven named buckets; modular assemblies is a narrower $381M entity-flagged cut inside that envelope.

text_body.plain_text:
The pool is submarine-led, while DDG supplies the distributed-production proof point.
Virginia/Columbia contributes $3.31B of the $3.88B annual TAM; DDG adds $573M per year and carries the clearest public distributed-production signal.
Broad SAM is the serviceable envelope, not a capture forecast.
Broad component manufacturing is $3.28B per year across the seven named buckets; modular assemblies is a narrower $381M entity-flagged cut inside that envelope.

runs.text: The answer is a submarine-led supplier pool near $3.9B per year, with DDG as the distributed-production proof point.

text_body.plain_text: The answer is a submarine-led supplier pool near $3.9B per year, with DDG as the distributed-production proof point.

runs.text: Sources: (1) Navy SCN and P-5c Basic Construction and AP/LLTM budget justification, FY2022–FY2027; (2) DoD place-of-performance award corpus and parent-prime PIID scope; (3) FFATA/FSRS subaward records and the operating-entity supplier registry
